name: 3 in 1 Charger for iPhone Watch and AirPods - heyday™ White
description:
Keep your devices powered up using the 3 in 1 Charger for iPhone Watch and AirPods from heyday™ in White. This 320-gram charger allows you to power up to 3 devices simultaneously, making it convenient to keep your devices ready-to-use. It features wireless charging, a charge indicator light and is MagSafe compatible with a magnetic mount for quick and easy setup. With a 6-foot USB cable and wall adapter included, it's a versatile accessory to use, right out of the box.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
